[Both the above two children of Saturn (Gulika and Mandi)
are malifics. In whichever sign/house they are placed, they
cause destruction]
It must be the use of word Mandaja (Child of Saturn) to
refer to both of them, m~st have started the confusion, of ill
treating both of them as one. We see many texts like
Phaladeepika, Jataka Parijata, Prasnamarga etc using the
words Gulika and Mandi as synonyms, and providing the
longitude of Mandi alone, and calling it sometimes Mandi
and sometimes Gulika! But as we can see from the earlier

36 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
references, sage Parasara and sage Mandavya gave special
importance to Gulika. Astrology being an Agama sastra
